overview: Ruby Storm is a W/U/R combo deck that accelerates mana with Ruby Medallion and Pyretic Ritual to cast cheap instants and sorceries rapidly. The game plan revolves around building a high storm count and using Ral, Monsoon Mage to replay key spells from the graveyard or resolve a finisher with multiple copies. Success requires protecting early plays from interaction while digging for the exact sequence of accelerants and draw needed to go off turns two through four.
win_conditions: Resolving a storm spell to generate massive value, direct damage, or token generation
Replaying a lethal finisher or key instant using Ral, Monsoon Mage's enter-the-battlefield ability
Overwhelming the board with storm copies and pumped creatures to bypass interaction

keep_criteria: Hands with at least two cheap instants or sorceries
Hands containing Ruby Medallion or Pyretic Ritual
Hands with Ral, Monsoon Mage and a red/blue instant to replay
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking mana acceleration or storm enablers
Hands with only high-cost permanents or lands
Hands without instant-speed interaction or card draw

examples.reason: Provides immediate acceleration, storm count, and card advantage to dig for combo pieces.
Lacks cheap instants/sorceries to replay or build storm count, making the combo difficult to assemble.

early_game: Play mana rocks and cheap instants to establish acceleration and storm count
Use card draw to dig for combo pieces and finishers
Hold up instant-speed disruption to protect key plays
mid_game: Assemble the storm combo and resolve the finisher
Use Ral, Monsoon Mage to replay discarded or resolved instants for additional value
Apply pressure with pumped creatures if the combo is delayed
late_game: Stabilize with Ral's recursion and board presence if the combo is countered
Use life total and card advantage to outlast opponents
Look for alternate win conditions like token generation or direct damage spells

key_cards.name: Ruby Medallion
key_cards.notes: Reduces red spell costs, enables early rituals, and buffs storm creatures or finishers.

key_cards.name: Pyretic Ritual
key_cards.notes: Provides flexible, instant-speed red mana to cast combo pieces or finishers early.

key_cards.name: Ral, Monsoon Mage
key_cards.notes: Returns key instants/sorceries from the graveyard to your hand, enabling combo reassembly or lethal replays.

sequencing_tips: Play Ruby Medallion before Pyretic Ritual to maximize red discount and pump
Cast cheap instants before drawing to maximize storm count
Use Ral's ETB to replay the most impactful instant or sorcery in your graveyard
Hold up instant-speed interaction to protect combo pieces from counterspells

matchups.advice: Race or go off turn two/three. Use disruption to delay attackers and prioritize acceleration.
Play around counterspells by splitting mana or using Ral to replay spells. Flood the board with storm copies to overwhelm hand size.
Apply early pressure with pumped creatures and instants. Use card draw to find combo pieces before they stabilize.
